title: salviastrum engelmannii
intro: Salviastrum engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's sage or Engelmann's mountain sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Salviastrum engelmannii include relieving colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as treating wounds and skin irritations. Salviastrum engelmannii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
